Ravi K.

AquaFunded is one of the best funding companies, there are no hidden rules that harm traders, there are no SL and lot rules. Rewards are fast and the support service is very friendly and responds quickly. AquaFunded is the best, I love it.

Hans W.

Great firm,no nonsense rules!Support super-fast and clear. Had no problems with my reward. Already got mysecond reward.I encourage people to be part of Aqua

Pierre L.

This is by far the best prop firm I have used; they aretrustworthy and have excellent customer service. Since being with AquaFunded I have completed both evaluations and just received my first reward. The reward was fast without any issues, I cannot recommend this company enough.It’s clear they care about their traders.

James R.

I have just received my first reward of over $13k. AquaFunded is the real deal. Their rules are fair and easy to follow. The customer support is 2nd to none and I'm happy to recommend them to anyone. Trust is key in this industry andthese guys have my full trust.

John S.

Customer service is 10/10, the moment you put a ticket in you get a reply immediately. Their spreads are amazing. The prices are very affordable. This is hands down thebest prop firm I have ever stumbled across!

Emily T.

I purchased the Two Step Challenge 10k from Aquafunded because the company offers suchgreat conditionsat anunbeatable price. The 90% profit split makes the company very attractive. The customer support is very quick & helpful. The speed and trade execution is also very fast & reliable. Very satisfied with AquaFunded.

Ahmed M.

Honestly, I've tried so many funded companies but what always disappointed me was their support team. Since I joined AquaFunded, I have hadno complaintsfrom the first day. What I love most about them is their hardworking team. WOW, WHAT A TEAM THEY ARE. Very quick, supportive and responsive. They will become thebest funded companyvery soon.

More Information
AquaFunded | Leading Prop Firm with Instant Funding & 100% Profit Split
What is a prop firm and how does it work?

A proprietary trading firm (prop firm) gives traders access to their capital, which they can then use to trade on the financial market. To gain access to a funded account, at AquaFunded, we give traders various entry models that they can choose from, including:

One-Step Challenge
Two-Step Challenge
Three-Step Challenge
Instant Funding

Once the objectives of the challenges are met (or you’ve chosen the “Instant Funding” model), you will become Aqua Trader and get your funded trading account. You can then start trading and get to keep up to 100% of profit you generate.

The prop firm challenge process

At AquaFunded, our prop firm challenge process is very simple and straightforward. Before you are eligible for a funded account, you need to meet the objectives of our evaluation challenge in 1, 2, or 3 steps.

The objectives and parameters that you need to reach and trade within vary depending on the entry model you choose. Once you have chosen the entry model and have checked out, you have as much time as you need to complete the challenge and qualify for a funded trader account.

Benefits of trading with a funded trading account

There are many benefits to trading with a funded trading account. Some of the main benefits that you can expect once you become an Aqua Trader include:

Trade with our firm’s capital, not yours
Keep 100% of the profits you generate
Access to larger buying power
Structured plan for long-term growth
First payout is available after just 7 days
Transparent performance tracking dashboard
How instant funding and profit sharing work at prop firms

The “Instant Funding” model allows you to skip the evaluation process and get access to a fully-funded trading account immediately. That way, you can begin trading using our firm’s capital from day one rather than having to complete a challenge to qualify for a funded account first.

In terms of profit sharing, you get to keep 90% of the profit you generate using our firm’s capital, while we retain 10%. If you want to keep 100% of the profit, please tick the “100% Profit Split” add-on at checkout.

Frequently asked questions about prop firms
What is a prop firm and how do I get started?

A prop trading firm, also known as a proprietary trading firm, provides traders with access to capital that they can use to trade with instead of using their own funds.

To get started with AquaFunded, simply choose “Instant Funding” or one of the alternative evaluation options, the model type, platform, and account size. Then, simply complete the purchase and you’re all set and ready to get started.

How do the AquaFunded prop firm challenges work?

AquaFunded’s challenges are designed to evaluate a trader’s consistency, discipline, and ability to manage risk under real market conditions. Once you sign up for a challenge, you will need to meet its set objectives, after which you will become an official Aqua Trader and get access to a funded account.

What are the benefits of a funded trading account?

The main benefit of using a funded trading account is that you don’t need to risk your own capital. Instead, you get to trade with our capital and earn a share of the profits you generate. Other benefits of using a funded trading account include:

Access to larger trading capital
Clear performance objectives
Professional trading environment
No long-term capital lock-up
Structured scaling plan
Fast payout times
What are the differences between the top prop trading firms?

The main differences between the top funded trading firms come down to their evaluation models, risk parameters, payout structures, and the overall trading conditions that traders will operate within.

Do I need experience to join a prop firm?

No, you don’t need formal experience or certifications to join a prop firm like AquaFunded. Anyone can sign up and participate in our challenge.

How long does the prop firm evaluation take?

Our prop firm evaluation period solely depends on how quickly you can complete the challenge and its respective objectives. We don’t set time limits, meaning you are not required to reach a certain target within a fixed number of days or weeks.

It’s your challenge, and you’re 100% in control of the pace. If you want to skip the challenge and get instant funding instead, you can do that too. Simply choose the “Instant Funding” model over a 1, 2, or 3-step challenge.

What happens if I fail the funded account challenge?

If you violate the rules or parameters of the funded account challenge you’ve signed up for, it will no longer be eligible for funding. Don’t worry though - there is no cooldown period or a limit on the number of attempts you can make. When you feel ready, you can always try again.
